title: Investdata Holds 11th Annual Traders, Investors Summit Saturday
description: As part of helping equity investors on the Nigerian Exchange Limited adequately prepare for the 2023 investment climate, Investdata Consulting Limited, will on Saturday, December 3, 2022, hold its ann
html:
As part of helping equity investors on the Nigerian Exchange Limited adequately prepare for the 2023 investment climate, Investdata Consulting Limited, will on Saturday, December 3, 2022, hold its annual summit tagged: Invest 2023 Traders & Investment Summit.

The annual investment conference, now in its 11th edition, has as theme: “Preparing For Financial Market Reset In 2023 & Beyond,” which is scheduled to hold on 9 am on ZOOM at the cost of N30,000 per participants.

A statement by the organisers said the event has over the years remained a game changer for market players, assuring that “this edition is aimed at helping stakeholders prepare for the financial market reset expected to happen next year, by identifying opportunities and bringing tradable ideas for profitable investment as we enter election year.”

Commenting on the one-day event, Ambrose Omordion, Chief Research Officer, Investdata Consulting Limited, organisers, the conference is aimed at enhancing “wealth transfers for the prepared, as the bull is underway after this correction “

Confirmed speakers for the conference, who are time-tested equity market traders, investment and economic analysts with several decades of research and investment banking experience, include Mr. Olatunde Amolegbe, Chief Executive, Arthur Steven Asset Management Ltd, and Immediate Past President of the Chartered Institute of Stockbrokers. He will billed to speak on “Budget 2023, Economic Headwinds & The Stock Market: Are Market Players Prepared?”

Alhaji Garba Kurfi, MD/CEO, APT Securities & Funds Ltd, will handle: “2023 Stock Market Outlook, And Identifying Great Value Stocks For Santa Claus & Post-Election Rally;” Mr Rotimi Olubi, MD, ARM Securities Ltd, will speak on “The Power of Technical Tools In Today’s Volatile Market; while Mr. Muktar Mohammed, MD, Muktar Finance Ltd, will address “Building Recession-Resistant Portfolios In A Financial Reset.”

Other speakers and topics include: “The Role of Commodity Trading In Wealth Creation, Agricultural Development;” Fixed Income Market Slice & Dice In A Changing Interest Rates, Inflationary Environment,” by Mr. Teriba Adeboye, MD/CEO, Qualinvest Capital Ltd; “Four Steps To Simplify Your Day Trading & Understanding the power of Breakout Trades,” by Mr. Abdul-Rasheed Oshoma Momoh, Head Capital Market, TRW Stockbrokers Ltd; Mr. Oladipo Ajayi, Head, Fixed Income at Chapel Hill Denham, who will speak on “Comprehensive & Complete Wealth Building Actionable Strategies for 2023;” while Mr. Ambrose Omordion, Chief Research Officer at Investdata Consulting Ltd, will give his usual outlook tagged: “10 Golden Stocks for 2023.”

“For those who desire profitable equity trading and investing, as discerning investors move cash to profitable assets ahead of year-end and the 2023 general elections, Invest 2023 is a must-attend capable of completely changing your view about wealth creation in a disconnected system,” Omordion said.

It is an opportunity to learn from the masters, he continued, “where the economy and stock market are headed, and when you should plunge in, or hold cash. Join equity market experts and other experienced professionals as they discuss a “Big Picture Perspective” of where the stock market and other investment windows are today, and what signs to watch for in the coming months.”

Participants, he stressed, will learn how to take advantage of market corrections for huge profit; strategies to stay in profit, overcome market correction/pullbacks; how to hedge against inflation and preserve your portfolio; understanding the power of liquidity and circular flow of funds in financial markets; and risk/return from Bonds to stocks right now. Others include commodity trading as another investment window to boost return; the exact sectors and tickers you should be looking at this volatile market; market events and others you can use to trade in any market situation.

Other benefits of attending include being admitted to Investdata “Buy & Sell” advisory WhatsApp platform. Interested participants can join the summit by sending YES to 08028164085, or 08179547605 today.
